title: Rosacea
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Supports burning or stinging, skin sensitivity, swelling, ocular irritation, eye symptoms, and vision concerns as clinician-assessed documentation fields.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports burning, sensitivity, ocular irritation, pain, and visual concern prompts.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Supports burning or stinging, skin sensitivity, swelling, ocular irritation, eye symptoms, and vision concerns as clinician-assessed documentation fields.

exact_section.heading: What are the symptoms of rosacea?

assessment.text: Supports rosacea identity, central facial distribution, flushing, persistent redness, visible vessels, papules or pustules, and trigger context.
assessment.rationale: Supports rosacea identity, facial redness, flushing, papules, visible vessels, and trigger context.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports rosacea identity, central facial distribution, flushing, persistent redness, visible vessels, papules or pustules, and trigger context.

exact_section.heading: What is rosacea and what causes it?

source_limitations: The source is patient information with an overdue review date.
Fever, blistering, mucosal or systemic findings, investigation options, skin-care or trigger advice, fixed follow-up, and treatment remain unsupported.
Qualified UAE clinician review is required.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
